title: Shape Verdict
description: Structured output schema for the shape-bead subagent. The subagent either successfully shapes the bead or escalates it because the original description lacks actionable signal.

beadId.title: Bead ID
beadId.description: The bead identifier that was shaped (e.g. 'pv-aaaa.2').

status.title: Status
status.description: Outcome of the shaping attempt. 'shaped' means the bead was successfully shaped and labelled. 'escalate' means the bead lacks actionable signal and requires human intervention.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: One-line summary of what was shaped or the reason for escalation.
